plugins.name: harness-dev
plugins.description: Authoring aids for building Claude Code skills — workflow, loop, and instruction shapes, and the specs behind them.

plugins.name: hi
plugins.description: Per-session prompt stack: push/pop/list/drop prompts across a session.

plugins.name: self-improvement
plugins.description: Captures generalizable behavioral rules from user corrections into CLAUDE.local.md on session end (Stop hook), maintains them with the improve-claude-local skill, and consolidates the accumulated rule corpus with the dream skill.

plugins.name: wm
plugins.description: Work lifecycle management v2 — phased workflows (research, plan, implement) with agents, commands, and hooks.
